headlines.description: Nestory Irankunda and Connor Metcalfe scored and Australia spoiled Türkiye's return to the World Cup for the first time in 24 years with a 2-0 victory on Saturday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Australia shock Türkiye to go level with USMNT

headlines.description: Kai Havertz scored two goals as Germany pulled away from World Cup first-timer Curaçao late in the opening half and piled on after that in a 7-1 win Sunday in a group match.
headlines.shortLinkText: Havertz double leads Germany in WC opening rout
